Curriculum Digests Newsletter

Chapter 1

The Skills We Will Teach

⏱️ 45 minutes

🎯 Learning Objectives

  • Understand why the PMM role is being redefined
  • Assess your current relationship with AI tools
  • Benchmark your skills against the 10X PMM framework
  • Preview the competencies this curriculum develops

The Headlines That Spooked Wall Street

In March 2026, Anthropic demoed Claude Cowork — and software stocks dropped 8% in a single day. The headlines were brutal:

"Wall Street Is Convinced AI Will Kill SaaS" Fortune
"Is SaaS Dead? Rethinking the Future of Software" IDC
"The Great SaaS Unbundling: Why AI Will Destroy Half the Industry" Uncover Alpha

IDC predicts that by 2028, pure seat-based pricing will be obsolete — 70% of vendors will refactor around consumption, outcomes, or capability metrics.

The fear is real. But is it right?

The Counter-Narrative

While panic spread, the data told a different story:

"Enterprise Tech Spending to Cross $6 Trillion in 2026" Computerworld
"Enterprise Software Spend Will Grow 15.2% in 2026" Gartner / SaaStr
"Global IT Spend to Exceed $6 Trillion" CIO Dive

Gartner projects software will remain the largest and fastest-growing segment of the $6T enterprise IT market.

Both narratives are right. Software isn't dying — but the way it's discovered, evaluated, and bought is being completely rewritten.

The PMMs who understand this shift will thrive. The ones who don't will wonder what happened.

SAP's Position

Here's what most people miss: SAP has the biggest data moat in enterprise.

  • Decades of structured business data across finance, supply chain, HR, and CX
  • The transactional backbone of the Global 2000
  • A platform where AI agents actually have something meaningful to work with

This is the best position in the industry for the AI era. But capturing it requires radical change in how we think about product marketing.

The playbook that worked in 2020 won't work in 2026.

Your World Has Changed

Let's be direct: the job you were hired for isn't the job anymore.

Then Now
Write messaging docs Shape what AI surfaces
Create sales decks Enable AI-assisted selling
Launch and wait for leads Build always-on visibility
Own the narrative Influence the synthesis
Compete on content volume Compete on signal quality

This isn't about adding AI tools to your workflow. It's about fundamentally rethinking what product marketing is in an AI-mediated world.

Two Assessments

Before we dive into the curriculum, let's establish where you stand today. Complete both assessments — they'll take about 15 minutes total.

🤖

Where Do You Sit?

How are you currently working with AI? Map your relationship with AI tools today.

~7 minutes
Take Assessment →
📊

10X PMM Scorecard

How do your skills stack up against the competencies that matter most?

~8 minutes
Take Scorecard →

The New PMM Skill Stack

This curriculum develops six core competencies:

Skill What It Means
AI Visibility Getting discovered by agents and LLMs
Position Defense Messaging that survives summarization
Technical Enablement Arming champions for deep evaluation
Commercial Strategy Pricing, packaging, and value articulation
Committee Navigation Multi-stakeholder deal orchestration
Lifecycle Marketing Adoption, expansion, and advocacy

Each chapter in this curriculum maps to one of these competencies.

✓ Knowledge Check

Test your understanding of the key concepts from this chapter.

1. What caused software stocks to drop 8% in March 2026?

2. According to Gartner, enterprise software spend in 2026 will:

3. What is SAP's primary advantage in the AI era?

4. The PMM role is changing because:

5. "Position Defense" means:
